overall.description: A third-person game scene following a character in a long dark coat walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The journey begins among historic stone ruins illuminated by vintage street lamps, transitions through an open mountain valley with scattered pine trees, and continues into a narrow rocky trail between steep cliff walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ruins with vintage street lamps

events.description: character walks past a vintage street lamp on the right side
approaching a stone archway marking the exit from the ruins area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through snowy ruins, passing stone pillars and vintage lamp posts

entered.detail: tall dark stone pillars and walls of ancient ruins
ornate cast-iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
snow-capped mountain peaks under dark blue night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open area surrounded by ancient stone ruins and vintage street lamps. Snow covers the ground and pine trees line the left side, while massive mountains rise in the background under a clear night sky. The character passes a glowing lamp post on the right as they approach a stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with scattered pine trees

events.description: passing through stone archway into open mountain valley
passing a vintage street lamp on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through open mountain valley, moving away from ruins toward natural landscape

entered.detail: stone archway marking the entrance to the valley
expansive snow-covered valley between mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the scene opens into a wide mountain valley. The stone ruins fall behind as the character moves through an open landscape dotted with pine trees on both sides. A vintage street lamp appears on the left, providing the last artificial light before the natural mountain terrain dominates the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain trail between rocky cliffs

events.description: entering narrow mountain trail between steep rock walls
path becomes steeper and more rugged terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow snowy trail between steep rock walls, moving deeper into the mountain pass

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the right wall of the narrow pass
narrow winding trail between cliff walls

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows significantly as the character enters a mountain pass enclosed by steep rocky cliff walls on both sides. The open valley disappears behind as the path winds deeper into the terrain. Snow continues to cover the ground between the dark rock walls, with distant pine trees visible far ahead in the narrow corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a lamp-lit ruin into a wide mountain valley and finally into a claustrophobic rocky pass. It begins with the character walking through an open area of ancient stone ruins and vintage street lamps, passing a glowing post on the right as they approach a stone archway. As the character moves through the arch, the scene opens into a wide mountain valley where the ruins fall away and the landscape expands into a snowy expanse dotted with pine trees. The view then shifts as the trail narrows significantly, leaving the open valley behind to enter a mountain pass enclosed by steep, dark rocky cliff walls. Finally, the path winds deeper into this narrow corridor, with snow-covered ground stretching toward distant pine trees visible far ahead.
